stemHtml: The automatic trim is a component of the autopilot pitch channel. Its function is to…

options.a: set the attitude to an instantaneous value before engaging the autopilot.
options.b: reset the attitude, after engaging the autopilot.
options.c: transfer a stabilised aeroplane to the pilot during autopilot disengagement.
options.d: automatically disengage the autopilot in the case of an excessive pitch up.
